title: trichocentrum viridulum
intro: Trichocentrum viridulum, commonly known as the Yellow Pansy Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It is a terrestrial orchid that produces bright yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and infection. Herbal preparations of Trichocentrum viridulum include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems.
